message:
deps(fuzz): refresh guard + storage fuzz Cargo.lock files

Pick up transitive resolution drift in the two fuzz subcrates'
lockfiles so `cargo fuzz run` doesn't start with an out-of-date
lock vs the workspace.

crates/mcp-agent-mail-guard/fuzz/Cargo.lock
- foldhash 0.1.5 → 0.2.0 (flows from the frankensqlite-core and
  frankensqlite-pager foldhash unification landed in the
  frankensqlite repo; every fsqlite-* subcrate the fuzz harness
  pulls through its [patch.crates-io] table sees the bump).

crates/mcp-agent-mail-storage/fuzz/Cargo.lock
- asupersync 0.2.9 → 0.3.1 (drops the old 0.2.9 record entirely;
  the storage fuzz harness now resolves to the same asupersync
  version the main workspace pins).
- A handful of transitive crates that asupersync's 0.3 tree no
  longer needs are removed from the lockfile.

These are purely generated artifacts — no Cargo.toml changes in
either fuzz subcrate; `cargo fuzz build` was the mechanism that
emitted them.
